agent.activated.description: An agent instance has been activated

agent.capability.bound.description: A capability has been bound to an agent

agent.capability.revoked.description: A capability has been revoked from an agent

agent.concurrency.limit_reached.description: An agent has reached its concurrency limit

agent.execution.escalated.description: An agent execution has been escalated

agent.governance.override.issued.description: A governance override has been issued for an agent

agent.quota.checked.description: Agent quota usage and concurrency limits checked

agent.quota.exceeded.description: An agent has exceeded its quota

agent.registration.approved.description: An agent registration has been approved

agent.registration.rejected.description: An agent registration has been rejected

agent.registration.submitted.description: An agent registration has been submitted

agent.suspended.description: An agent instance has been suspended

agent.terminated.description: An agent instance has been terminated

governance.amendment.proposed.description: A constitutional amendment has been proposed

governance.amendment.ratified.description: A constitutional amendment has been ratified

governance.audit.queried.description: An audit query has been executed

governance.capability.granted.description: A capability has been granted to an actor

governance.capability.revoked.description: A capability has been revoked from an actor

governance.emergency_halt.issued.description: An emergency system halt has been issued

governance.emergency_halt.lifted.description: An emergency system halt has been lifted

governance.escalation.expired.description: A governance escalation has expired without resolution

governance.escalation.resolved.description: A governance escalation has been resolved

governance.escalation.submitted.description: A governance escalation has been submitted

governance.oversight.reviewed.description: An oversight review has been completed

governance.policy_rule.activated.notific.description: Notification sent to affected domains after policy rule activation

governance.policy_rule.review_requested.description: Governance review has been requested for a policy rule

governance.proposal.approved.description: A governance proposal has been approved

governance.proposal.cancelled.description: A governance proposal has been cancelled

governance.proposal.expired.description: A governance proposal has expired without action

governance.proposal.implemented.description: A governance proposal has been implemented

governance.proposal.rejected.description: A governance proposal has been rejected

governance.proposal.submitted.description: A new governance proposal has been submitted

identity.actor.registered.description: A new actor has been registered in the Identity subsystem

identity.actor.verified.description: An actor has been verified by an authority

identity.authority.flagged_unknown.description: Authority flagged as unknown for escalation

identity.credential.issued.description: A credential has been issued to an actor

identity.delegation.created.description: A delegation of authority has been created

identity.delegation.expired.description: A delegation of authority has expired

identity.delegation.limit_exceeded.description: A delegation chain depth limit has been exceeded

identity.delegation.revoked.description: A delegation of authority has been revoked

identity.session.authentication_failed.description: An identity session authentication attempt failed

identity.session.created.description: A new session has been created for an authenticated actor

identity.trust_anchor.registered.description: A trust anchor has been registered

intent.converted_to_command.description: An intent has been converted to a command

intent.multi_step.completed.description: A multi-step intent has been completed

intent.multi_step.step_completed.description: A step within a multi-step intent has been completed

intent.received.description: A new intent has been received from an actor

intent.rejected.description: Intent rejected during intake or enrichment

intent.resumed.description: Intent evaluation resumed after escalation resolution

intent.submitted.description: Intent submitted by external client or agent

intent.validated.description: An intent has been validated and is ready for conversion

ledger.account.closed.description: A ledger account has been closed

ledger.account.created.description: A new account has been added to the chart of accounts

ledger.account.frozen.description: An account has been frozen, preventing new postings

ledger.entry.corrected.description: A compensating correction entry has been posted
guarantees: original entry exists and was POSTED or SETTLED

updates.for each posting: apply debit/credit to account running balance

ledger.entry.posted.description: A journal entry has been validated and posted to the ledger
guarantees: event reference was valid and not already journalized

updates.for each posting: apply debit/credit to account running balance

ledger.entry.rejected.description: A journal entry failed validation and was rejected

ledger.entry.reversed.description: A journal entry has been reversed by a new entry with inverse postings
guarantees: original entry exists and was POSTED or SETTLED
both entries link to each other

updates.for each posting: apply inverse debit/credit to account running balance

ledger.journal.created.description: A new journal has been created in the ledger

ledger.period.closed.description: An accounting period has been fully closed
guarantees: next period can now be closed

ledger.period.closing.description: An accounting period is being closed with closing entries
guarantees: all entries for the period are settled

ledger.reconciliation.completed.description: A ledger reconciliation has been resolved

ledger.reconciliation.mismatch_detected.description: A discrepancy was found during ledger reconciliation

ledger.reconciliation.started.description: A ledger reconciliation process has been initiated

payment.execution.compensated.description: Payment execution compensated after saga failure

guarantees: Selected rail is compatible with asset type

payment.execution.settled.description: A payment execution has been settled

payment.rail.confirmation_timed_out.description: Rail confirmation phase timed out for a payment request

guarantees: Actual amount matches or discrepancy was flagged

payment.rail.confirming.description: A payment request is being confirmed on a rail

guarantees: Adapter did not mutate constitutional state

payment.rail.executing.description: A payment request is executing on a rail

payment.rail.execution_timed_out.description: Rail execution phase timed out for a payment request

guarantees: Failure was captured without data loss

payment.rail.prepare_timed_out.description: Rail preparation phase timed out for a payment request

guarantees: Adapter did not mutate constitutional state

payment.rail.preparing.description: A payment request is being prepared on a rail

payment.rail.validated.description: A payment request has been validated on a rail

payment.rail.validating.description: A payment request is being validated on a rail

payment.rail.validation_timed_out.description: Rail validation phase timed out for a payment request

guarantees: payment_request.state was in a cancellable state
No adapter execution was in progress

payment.settlement.confirmed.description: A payment settlement has been confirmed

policy.compliance.requirement.registered.description: A compliance requirement has been registered

policy.compliance.violation.detected.description: A compliance violation has been detected during evaluation

policy.escalation.created.description: A policy escalation has been created

policy.escalation.expired.description: Policy escalation window expired without resolution

policy.escalation.resolved.description: A policy escalation has been resolved

policy.evaluation.active_operation_block.description: Operation blocked by active policy evaluation rule

policy.evaluation.completed.description: A policy evaluation has been completed with a decision

policy.evaluation.deferred.description: A policy evaluation has been deferred to a later time

policy.evaluation.denied.description: A policy evaluation has resulted in a denial

policy.evaluation.escalated.description: A policy evaluation has been escalated for human review

policy.rule.activated.description: A policy rule has been activated

policy.rule.created.description: A new policy rule has been created

policy.rule.deactivated.description: A policy rule has been deactivated

policy.rule.updated.description: A policy rule has been updated to a new version

saga.compensated.description: A saga instance has been fully compensated

saga.compensating.description: A saga instance is in the compensating phase

saga.completed.description: A saga instance has completed successfully

treasury.liquidity.warning.description: Liquidity has fallen below a configured threshold
guarantees: threshold breach is real (computed from projection)
no false positives from stale data

treasury.settlement.confirmed.description: Settlement has been confirmed for a transfer

treasury.transfer.authorized.description: A transfer has passed identity, capability, and policy gates

treasury.transfer.compensation_required.description: A compensation saga has been initiated for a failed transfer

treasury.transfer.executing.description: Transfer execution has begun on the payment rail
guarantees: vault lock was ACTIVE at time of execution

treasury.transfer.expired.description: A transfer has expired without completing

treasury.transfer.failed.description: A transfer has failed during execution or settlement
guarantees: vault lock may need to be released

treasury.transfer.requested.description: A new treasury transfer has been requested

treasury.transfer.reserved.description: Vault reservation has been locked for a transfer

treasury.transfer.settled.description: A transfer has been confirmed as settled
guarantees: settlement confirmed by external rail or reconciliation
ledger journal entry will be posted

vault.asset.impaired.description: An asset has been marked as impaired due to value decline
guarantees: asset existed and was in operational state
valuation drop detected by trusted source

vault.asset.registered.description: A new asset has been registered in the Vault
guarantees: no existing asset with same asset_id

vault.asset.rejected.description: An asset has been rejected during verification
guarantees: asset was in REGISTERED or VERIFIED state
asset is now in REJECTED state

vault.asset.verification_failed.description: Vault asset verification or ownership transfer failed

vault.asset.verified.description: An asset has been verified to exist and be correct
guarantees: asset is now in VERIFIED state

vault.asset.write_down.description: An asset has been permanently written down

vault.collateral.added.description: An asset has been pledged as collateral

vault.collateral.liquidation_initiated.description: Collateral liquidation has begun after unresolved margin call
guarantees: margin call was unresolved past deadline

vault.collateral.margin_call.description: A margin call has been triggered on a collateral position
guarantees: margin ratio fell below maintenance threshold
collateral is now in RELEASED state

vault.collateral.revalued.description: Collateral valuation has been updated due to market change
guarantees: valuation source was trusted and not stale

vault.custody.attested.description: Custody has been attested (proof of asset existence)

guarantees: asset may be restricted from operations

vault.ownership.transferred.description: Ownership of an asset has been transferred

vault.reconciliation.completed.description: A vault reconciliation has completed successfully

vault.reconciliation.discrepancy_found.description: A discrepancy was found during reconciliation

vault.reconciliation.started.description: A vault reconciliation has been initiated

vault.reserve.created.description: A value reservation has been created

vault.reserve.expired.description: A reservation has expired without being consumed
guarantees: reservation was in PENDING or ACTIVE state
value has been returned to available pool
reservation is now in EXPIRED state

vault.reserve.locked.description: A reservation has been locked, committing the value
guarantees: reservation is now in ACTIVE state with lock

vault.reserve.released.description: A reservation has been released, returning value to available pool
guarantees: reservation was in PENDING or ACTIVE state
value has been returned to available pool
reservation is now in RELEASED state

vault.transaction.failed.description: Transaction cancelled or failed during lifecycle

vault.valuation.updated.description: An asset valuation has been updated
